description: Editorial seed for the Holder Multiple pipeline. Per-protocol inputs that DL/CG do not provide cleanly — unlock schedules, buyback rates, Category B yields, phase regimes. Combines with data/latest.json (live DL+CG snapshot) in scripts/hm/compute-hm.js to produce the HM breakdown.
notes: Token-quantity fields (unlocks_24mo_tokens, emissions_24mo_tokens) are multiplied by live price at compute time.
Dollar fields (annual_buyback_usd, annual_holder_yield_usd) are taken as-is in v1 (lenient verification).
buyback_24mo_usd is supplied directly rather than computed as annual_buyback_usd * 2, so phased schedules (e.g. SKY Phase 1 -> Phase 3 mid-window) can be modelled precisely later.
Each $ figure carries a `verification` field per the Buyback Quality Framework: `onchain` | `governance_stated` | `proxy`. v1 is lenient — most rows are governance_stated.

sky.name: Sky

phase.notes: Phase 1 of TMF framework. SBE bypassed during ABC fill (~15 months base case from Apr 2026). 40% of net revenue → ABC, 40% → SKY stakers (as USDS), 20% → Security/Maintenance.

sky.emissions_24mo_notes: Staking yield paid in USDS, not new SKY
sky.annual_buyback_notes: SBE bypassed during Phase 1; verified on-chain — MCD_FLAP + MCD_SPLIT have zero activity 90d
sky.annual_holder_yield_notes: Article: 40% × $180.73M net revenue paid in USDS to stkSKY (Cat B). On-chain (REWARDS_LSSKY_USDS = 0x38E4254b...) confirms USDS distribution mechanism — but inflows stopped 2025-11-03, 200+ days dormant. Either restructured post-Apr-2026 framework or paused.

tmf_waterfall.abc_level_note: ABC is a managed Keel ALM portfolio (sUSDS / RWAs / Spark-Grove) — current level is not cleanly readable from a single on-chain balance.
tmf_waterfall.source: Sky governance TMF executive (Apr/May 2026); percentages are governance framework params, editable here.

aave.name: Aave

phase.notes: ARFC $30M/yr buyback budget (cut from original $50M). AWW Framework commits 100% product revenue to DAO.

aave.emissions_24mo_notes: Safety Module + Service Provider compensation (285K AAVE over 24mo)
aave.annual_buyback_notes: ARFC $30M/yr budget; seed value — overridden by onchain feed when present
aave.annual_holder_yield_notes: No Category B yield — Safety Module rewards are stkAAVE emissions (Category C, dilution rebate)

hyperliquid.name: Hyperliquid

phase.notes: Assistance Fund captures ~99% of revenue for HYPE buybacks. Team vesting cliff active.

hyperliquid.unlocks_24mo_notes: Y1 119M + Y2 89.3M team unlocks (Tokenomist scheduled rate)
hyperliquid.emissions_24mo_notes: Staking emissions paid from Future Emissions allocation (Category C — added to dilution side)
hyperliquid.annual_buyback_notes: 30d revenue × 12 × 99% AF capture rate (seed value — overridden by onchain feed when present)
hyperliquid.annual_holder_yield_notes: No Category B — staking rewards are HYPE-denominated dilution rebate (Category C)

lighter.name: Lighter

phase.notes: TGE float. 99.5% of post-LLP revenue used to algorithmically buy back LIT. Team/investor cliff Dec 22 2026.

lighter.unlocks_24mo_notes: 54M Y1 + 162M Y2; cliff Dec 22 2026 unlocks 13.5M/mo across 36mo linear
lighter.annual_buyback_notes: 99.5% × post-LLP revenue. Proxy via DL holdersRevenue ($25.6M/yr, matches stated rate within 0.3%) until Lighter API key unlocks direct trade-level verification.
lighter.annual_holder_yield_notes: No Category B — staking yield is LIT-denominated (Category C)

synthesized_overrides._doc: Per-symbol overrides applied to synthesized seeds (tokens iterated from data/config.json but without a full editorial row in `protocols` above). Each entry replaces specific fields without forcing a full seed; the rest derive from data/latest.json + data/config.json.va_*. Use sparingly — only when the live DL feed materially diverges from verified on-chain reality.

JTO.comment: JIP-31 (passed late 2025, extended via JIP-37) temporarily redirects 100% of Block Engine + BAM fees to validator subsidies through Q1-Q3 2026 to bootstrap BAM adoption. The CSD buyback program ($30M+ cumulative since Aug 2025, fully verifiable on Solscan/Dune) is paused, not removed. Mechanism resumes post-Q3 2026 per governance. Without this override, Phase A would source JTO real-capture from DL revenue × 100% accrual_pct = ~$20M/yr, which is the rate when buybacks are active — wrong for current dormant phase.

COW.comment: CIP-38 buybacks execute at DAO treasury level; DL holdersRevenue is null because DL doesn't categorize treasury-owned buybacks. Deep dive (Apr 2026) estimates ~80% of $10.4M/yr forward revenue → buybacks = $8.3M/yr to keep weekly buyback ≥ 1.2× weekly emissions (net-negative emissions invariant). Treasury growth ≈ revenue rate when active — proxy works.

GMX.comment: Status=paused: 27% of V2 fees → algorithmic buybacks ARE executing on-chain (verified, 2M+ GMX repurchased since end-2024), but distribution to stakers is paused until GMX ≥ $90 per Mar 2026 DAO vote. Current price ~$6 = 14.5× below gate. From a holder-flow perspective the buyback creates supply compression (Cat A) but no immediate cashflow — treat as onchain_dormant. accrual_annual_est=$6.4M reflects the on-chain buyback rate; we keep it as Cat A but flag dormant.

SNX.comment: Q1 2026 SIP-2043 routes 100% of perps trading fees to SNX buybacks (50/50 split with sUSD stability until peg restored). Config claims $4.5M in first 6 weeks ($39M/yr annualized) but DL shows $0 fees/revenue under all synthetix slugs — execution UNVERIFIED. Until on-chain Dune or block-explorer trace confirms, leave at $0 with governance_stated verification.

LDO.comment: $20M discretionary buyback approved Apr 13 2026 but not executing yet; NEST automated buybacks conditional on ETH ≥ $3K (currently below). Real_capture stays $0 until first tranche traces on-chain. Status=conditional + accrual_pct=0 → already $0 in latest.json (no override needed for amount).

DYDX.comment: config note flags: 'TTM fees overstated — use ann_rev_override'. Our compute already uses forward run-rate (holders_revenue_30d × 12) via accrual_annual_est = $3.19M. No override needed — flagging here for visibility.

ETHFI.comment: DL splits ether.fi across 3 sub-protocols (ether.fi-liquid, etherfi-cash-liquid, etherfi-borrowing-market) — no parent fees endpoint. data/config.json has accrual_pct=1.0 which is WRONG: per DAO Proposal #8, only 10% of protocol revenue routes to ETHFI value accrual (5% buyback+burn, 5% sETHFI staker distributions). Our scripts/onchain/proxy/fetch-etherfi-buybacks.js aggregates the 3 sub-protocols and applies 10%, producing ~$4.25M/yr last-30d annualized. NOTE: This excludes the $50M discretionary treasury buyback approved Nov 2025 (triggers at price < $3 — ACTIVE) since DL doesn't surface it. Long-term fix: update data/config.json ETHFI accrual_pct to 0.1.
